title: Dependency-graph schema fidelity
description:
Make the exported schema for the dependency-graph command match the shape the command actually emits.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-15: the exported schema for graph deps matches the response shape the command emits, with no dead-code warning left from an orphaned response type.

## Notes

The schema maps `graph_deps` to `GraphDepsResponse` (schema.rs:421-423) but the handler emits `GraphDepsTreeResponse` (main.rs:2822-2834). Repoint the schema and, in the same change, remove or repurpose the now-orphaned `GraphDepsResponse` (output.rs:657) so it does not become dead code that fails the clippy gate.
